allow: PowerShell($gh = \(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); "gh path: $\($gh.Source\)"; if \($gh\) { gh auth status 2>&1 | Out-String }; "--- vercel ---"; $v = \(Get-Command vercel -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); "vercel path: $\($v.Source\)"; "--- git remote ---"; git remote -v; "--- git user ---"; git config user.name; git config user.email)
